messages.content: Some English words sound like what they mean. These words are iconic. You might be able to guess the meaning of such a word even if you did not know English. Some words rated low in iconicity are "menu", "amateur", and "are", because they do not sound at all like what they mean. In this task, you are going to rate words for how iconic they are. A rating of 1 indicates that the word is not at all iconic and does not at all sound like what it means. 7 indicates that the word is high in iconicity and sounds very much like what it means. Please limit your answer to numbers. The word is "achy".
